title: Garlicky Oozy Uruguayan Paella Rice Paella
description: A comforting and flavorful Uruguayan dish featuring paella rice, namul-blanch-season, and dairy-free-friendly options. This recipe is perfect for a cozy evening with family and friends.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the smoked chorizo and cook for 2 minutes, until slightly browned.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms and cook for 3 minutes, until they start to release their moisture.
Add the paella rice and stir to combine with the chorizo and mushroom mixture.
Add the namul-blanch-season and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the fresh parsley and lemon juice.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
